history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young Asian woman with long, dark, flowing hair, looking down at her phone, is seated at an outdoor cafe. She is wearing a white top with a sweetheart neckline and a black long-sleeved jacket. A silver necklace is visible around her neck. On her left wrist, she wears a smartwatch with a dark screen and a white band. Beside her, a quilted pink handbag with a silver chain strap rests on her lap.

The background is softly blurred, suggesting an outdoor seating area with lush greenery and palm fronds. An open white umbrella is visible behind her, and in the distance, other patrons are seated at tables, adding to the cafe ambiance. The lighting is soft and natural, creating a gentle, relaxed mood. The color palette is dominated by natural greens, soft whites, and warm skin tones, with the black jacket and pink handbag providing subtle contrasts. The overall aesthetic is casual, chic, and serene.
